previous: The Atlas release is enabled for all customers.
current: The Atlas release is not enabled for any customers.

previous: The audit export includes deleted records.
current: The audit export never includes deleted records.

previous: Project Cedar is owned by the Platform team.
current: Project Cedar is not owned by the Platform team.

previous: The migration is complete.
current: The migration is not complete.

previous: The launch must happen on September 15.
current: The launch cannot happen before October 1.

previous: Every account must use SSO.
current: Accounts must not use SSO.

previous: Customer data must remain in Canada.
current: Customer data must be stored outside Canada.

previous: The API shall accept anonymous requests.
current: The API shall reject all anonymous requests.

previous: Production requires SSO for version 2.
current: Development disables SSO for version 1.

previous: Enterprise customers receive audit exports.
current: Free tier customers do not receive audit exports.

previous: The mobile beta uses the compact navigation.
current: The desktop general availability release does not use compact navigation.

previous: Staging sends synthetic alerts.
current: Production does not send synthetic alerts.

previous: The migration is paused this week.
current: The migration will run next week.

previous: The 2025 roadmap excludes mobile.
current: The 2026 roadmap includes mobile.

previous: The service is read-only today.
current: The service is writable tomorrow.

previous: Q1 2026 has no hiring budget.
current: Q3 2026 has a hiring budget.

previous: I propose that we launch in September.
current: The final launch date is October 8.

previous: I prefer a three-step onboarding flow.
current: The approved onboarding flow has five steps.

previous: Maybe we could disable password login.
current: Password login remains enabled.

previous: Draft option: retain logs for 90 days.
current: The confirmed retention period is 30 days.

previous: The old deadline was September 15.
current: Revised decision: September 15 is superseded by October 8.

previous: Use vendor Northstar for email.
current: The vendor decision was replaced; use Aurora for email.

previous: Guests may export reports.
current: Updated decision: guests may no longer export reports.

previous: The incident is active.
current: The incident is resolved and that earlier status is no longer current.

previous: The launch is scheduled for October 8.
current: The current launch date is October 8.

previous: Audit logs are retained for 30 days.
current: The retention window for audit logs is one month.

previous: The API uses OAuth authentication.
current: The API documentation is published internally.

previous: The mobile client supports offline drafts.
current: The web client supports keyboard shortcuts.
